items.text:
I'm surprised you weren't praying
for an ambush.

Up til then, the voyage must have been
pretty awkward.

Not at all. It's only the higher-ups who
pretend to hate me. The regular guys
on the line, they respect what I did.

Izzy, can't you see how they looked at him?
They all wanted to be him,
... and they were glad not to be him.
